case_title: PALMAIR TRAVEL INC. VS MASARWEH MARWAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,225.00 FILED BY PALMAIR TRAVEL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MASARWEH MARWAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALMAIR TRAVEL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASARWEH MARWAN $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,315.00, $300 DUE BY 10/7/94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
